commit_scope: JIT surface realization (slice 1): close gap #3 from kernels/JIT_GAP_LEDGER.md — logic ops (and/or/not) now supported in the typed i64 unboxed path. Per ledger sketch: emit 0/1 int boolean expressions over truthy inputs using the same IIFE/cond style as compare. Extends pure-int guard/mask recipes to native speed without walker fallback or boxing. Updated go-jit-band.fk to exercise. Part of larger campaign to full BMF-compiler + JIT all-native / folded / unboxed / all-primitives.
